title: glechoma decolorans
intro: Glechoma decolorans, also known as Creeping Lemon Balm or Creeping Jenny, is a type of perennial herb that belongs to the mint family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent, to treat various health issues such as wounds, burns, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Glechoma decolorans include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote a good night's sleep. Herbal preparations of Glechoma decolorans can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
